prompt: 为 anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python 的 v0.86.0 生成 release notes，输出到 workspace/eval-2-sdk-release/with_skill/outputs/release-notes-v0.86.0.md

assertions.description: Output file exists and is non-empty
Version v0.86.0 appears in the document
If breaking changes exist, they are in a dedicated section with What changed + How to update
assertions.check: if '💥 Breaking' present then text contains 'What changed' AND 'How to update'; else pass

assertions.description: Contains pip install command for this version
assertions.check: text contains 'pip install anthropic==0.86.0' or 'pip install anthropic' near version reference

assertions.description: No stainless-app[bot] PR content in body
PR links follow correct github.com format
